scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm -w @singedterra/client run build
scripts.deploy:backend: npx supabase db push --yes && npx supabase functions deploy --use-api --yes
scripts.typecheck: npm -w @singedterra/shared run typecheck && npm -w @singedterra/client run typecheck
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npx tsx scripts/checks/determinism.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/collision.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/timestep.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/turnstate.mjs && npx && npx tsx scripts/checks/collapse.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/collapse_engine.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/collapse_flush.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/netretry.mjs && npx tsx
